messages.content:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：速度太快了，并且AI要自动吃食物。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。

modifications.prompt:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：速度太快了，并且AI要自动吃食物。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。
modifications.code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>速度太快了 - AI吃食物游戏</title>
    <style>
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
            font-family: 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif;
        }
        canvas {
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas"></canvas>
    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        canvas.width = 360;
        canvas.height = 640;

        // 游戏状态
        let gameState = 'menu'; // menu, playing, paused, gameover
        let player, ai, foods, playerScore, aiScore, highScore;
        let lastTime = 0;
        let deltaTime = 0;

        // 输入状态
        const keys = {};

        // 初始化游戏
        function init() {
            player = {
                x: canvas.width / 4,
                y: canvas.height / 2,
                radius: 15,
                speed: 300, // 像素每秒
                color: '#4fd1c5',
                score: 0
            };
            ai = {
                x: canvas.width * 3 / 4,
                y: canvas.height / 2,
                radius: 15,
                speed: 250,
                color: '#ff6b6b',
                score: 0
            };
            foods = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
                foods.push(createFood());
            }
            playerScore = 0;
            aiScore = 0;
            highScore = localStorage.getItem('highScore') || 0;
        }

        // 创建食物
        function createFood() {
            return {
                x: Math.random() * (canvas.width - 20) + 10,
                y: Math.random() * (canvas.height - 20) + 10,
                radius: 8,
                color: '#ffd93d'
            };
        }

        // 输入处理
        function handleInput(key, pressed) {
            if (gameState === 'menu' && key === ' ' && pressed) {
                gameState = 'playing';
                init();
                lastTime = performance.now();
            } else if (gameState === 'playing' && key === 'p' && pressed) {
                gameState = 'paused';
            } else if (gameState === 'paused' && key === 'p' && pressed) {
                gameState = 'playing';
                lastTime = performance.now();
            } else if (gameState === 'gameover' && key === ' ' && pressed) {
                gameState = 'menu';
            }
        }

        // 键盘事件监听
        window.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            keys[e.key] = true;
            handleInput(e.key, true);
        });
        window.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
            keys[e.key] = false;
            handleInput(e.key, false);
        });

        // 游戏逻辑更新
        function update(deltaTime) {
            if (gameState !== 'playing') return;

            // 玩家移动
            let dx = 0, dy = 0;
            if (keys['ArrowUp'] || keys['w']) dy -= 1;
            if (keys['ArrowDown'] || keys['s']) dy += 1;
            if (keys['ArrowLeft'] || keys['a']) dx -= 1;
            if (keys['ArrowRight'] || keys['d']) dx += 1;

            if (dx !== 0 || dy !== 0) {
                const length = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
                dx /= length;
                dy /= length;
            }

            player.x += dx * player.speed * deltaTime;
            player.y += dy * player.speed * deltaTime;

            // 边界检查
            player.x = Math.max(player.radius, Math.min(canvas.width - player.radius, player.x));
            player.y = Math.max(player.radius, Math.min(canvas.height - player.radius, player.y));

            // AI移动：寻找最近的食物
            let nearestFood = null;
            let minDist = Infinity;
            for (let food of foods) {
                const dist = Math.hypot(ai.x - food.x, ai.y - food.y);
                if (dist < minDist) {
                    minDist = dist;
                    nearestFood = food;
                }
            }

            if (nearestFood) {
                const angle = Math.atan2(nearestFood.y - ai.y, nearestFood.x - ai.x);
                ai.x += Math.cos(angle) * ai.speed * deltaTime;
                ai.y += Math.sin(angle) * ai.speed * deltaTime;
            }

            // AI边界检查
            ai.x = Math.max(ai.radius, Math.min(canvas.width - ai.radius, ai.x));
            ai.y = Math.max(ai.radius, Math.min(canvas.height - ai.radius, ai.y));

            // 玩家吃食物
            for (let i = foods.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                const food = foods[i];
                const dist = Math.hypot(player.x - food.x, player.y - food.y);
                if (dist < player.radius + food.radius) {
                    foods.splice(i, 1);
                    playerScore++;
                    foods.push(createFood());
                }
            }

            // AI吃食物
            for (let i = foods.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                const food = foods[i];
                const dist = Math.hypot(ai.x - food.x, ai.y - food.y);
                if (dist < ai.radius + food.radius) {
                    foods.splice(i, 1);
                    aiScore++;
                    foods.push(createFood());
                }
            }

            // 更新得分
            player.score = playerScore;
            ai.score = aiScore;

            // 游戏结束条件：玩家或AI得分达到20
            if (playerScore >= 20 || aiScore >= 20) {
                gameState = 'gameover';
                if (playerScore > highScore) {
                    highScore = playerScore;
                    localStorage.setItem('highScore', highScore);
                }
            }
        }

        // 游戏渲染
        function render() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // 绘制背景
            const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
            gradient.addColorStop(0, '#1a1a2e');
            gradient.addColorStop(1, '#16213e');
            ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            if (gameState === 'menu') {
                // 菜单界面
                ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
                ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.textAlign = 'center';
                ctx.fillText('速度太快了', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 3);
                ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.fillText('按空格键开始游戏', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
                ctx.fillText('使用方向键或WASD控制', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 30);
                ctx.fillText('AI自动吃食物', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 60);
            } else if (gameState === 'playing' || gameState === 'paused') {
                // 绘制食物
                for (let food of foods) {
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.arc(food.x, food.y, food.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                    ctx.fillStyle = food.color;
                    ctx.fill();
                    ctx.closePath();
                }

                // 绘制玩家
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(player.x, player.y, player.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fillStyle = player.color;
                ctx.fill();
                ctx.closePath();

                // 绘制AI
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(ai.x, ai.y, ai.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fillStyle = ai.color;
                ctx.fill();
                ctx.closePath();

                // 绘制得分
                ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
                ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.textAlign = 'center';
                ctx.fillText('玩家得分: ', canvas.width / 2 - 50, 30);
                ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
                ctx.fillText(playerScore, canvas.width / 2 + 30, 30);

                ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
                ctx.fillText('AI得分: ', canvas.width / 2 - 50, 60);
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
                ctx.fillText(aiScore, canvas.width / 2 + 30, 60);

                ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
                ctx.fillText('最高分: ', canvas.width / 2 - 50, 90);
                ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
                ctx.fillText(highScore, canvas.width / 2 + 30, 90);

                // 暂停界面
                if (gameState === 'paused') {
                    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)';
                    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                    ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
                    ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
                    ctx.fillText('游戏暂停', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
                    ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                    ctx.fillText('按P键继续', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
                }
            } else if (gameState === 'gameover') {
                // 游戏结束界面
                ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
                ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
                ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.textAlign = 'center';
                ctx.fillText('游戏结束', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 3);
                ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.fillText(`玩家得分: ${playerScore}`, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
                ctx.fillText(`AI得分: ${aiScore}`, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 30);
                ctx.fillText(`最高分: ${highScore}`, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 60);
                ctx.fillText('按空格键返回菜单', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 100);
            }
        }

        // 游戏循环
        function gameLoop(currentTime) {
            deltaTime = (currentTime - lastTime) / 1000;
            lastTime = currentTime;

            update(deltaTime);
            render();

            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }

        // 启动游戏
        init();
        lastTime = performance.now();
        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    </script>
</body>
</html>
